$note: Question bank for students + teacher review. Optional per-item "level" (e.g. beginner) is used when quiz_publish.json mode is "filter". Which ids go live is controlled only by quiz_publish.json (not the app). Keep answer_key.json in sync for every id you publish.

1.title: What HTML is
1.prompt: What does HTML let you create?

2.title: Open / close tag
2.prompt: Which line correctly writes a paragraph that says Hello?

3.title: Heading size
3.prompt: Which tag makes text the LARGEST by default?

4.title: Bold text
4.prompt: Which tag is usually shown as BOLD text?

5.title: Italic text
5.prompt: Which tag is usually shown as ITALIC text?

6.title: A correct link
6.prompt: Which line creates a link to https://example.com that says Click here?

7.title: A correct image
7.prompt: Which line shows an image cat.png with the description A cat?

8.title: Body tag
8.prompt: Which tag holds everything the user SEES on the page?

9.title: Title location
9.prompt: Where does the page TITLE (shown in the browser tab) go?

choices.b: Adds a line break inside text

11.title: Paragraph tag
11.prompt: Type the tag used for a paragraph. Include the angle brackets.

12.title: Largest heading
12.prompt: Type the tag for the LARGEST heading.

13.title: Second-largest heading
13.prompt: Type the tag for the SECOND-largest heading.

14.title: Line break
14.prompt: Type the tag that adds a single line break.

15.title: Bold (strongly important)
15.prompt: Type the tag that makes text BOLD (the one that means strongly important).

16.title: Italic (emphasis)
16.prompt: Type the tag that makes text ITALIC (the one used for emphasis).

17.title: Clickable link
17.prompt: What tag do you use to make a clickable link?

18.title: Show an image
18.prompt: What tag do you use to put an image on a page?

19.title: Whole page
19.prompt: What tag holds the WHOLE web page? Everything else goes inside it.

20.title: Behind-the-scenes
20.prompt: What tag holds the page's title and other behind-the-scenes settings?

21.title: Visible content
21.prompt: What tag holds everything the user SEES on the page?

22.title: Link destination word
22.prompt: In Home, which word goes right before the equals sign (=) to say where the link goes?

23.title: Close a paragraph
23.prompt: Fill in the blank to close the paragraph correctly.

24.title: Open a heading
24.prompt: Fill in the blank to open the heading correctly.

25.title: Link destination
25.prompt: Fill in the blank so the link points to a web address.

26.title: Image file
26.prompt: Fill in the blank so the image knows which file to show.

27.title: Image description
27.prompt: Fill in the blank with the word that gives the image its description.

28.title: Page skeleton
28.prompt: Fill in the missing tag name (no angle brackets — they are already there).

29.title: Close bold text
29.prompt: Fill in the blank to close the bold text correctly.

30.title: Close a link
30.prompt: Fill in the blank to close the link correctly.
